nomear-trailer-01-veu-suspenso: Pale translucent silk veil suspended motionless. The veil breathes in gently, as if stirred by unseen air. Tiny dust particles drift slowly through warm amber light. Dark depths behind.
nomear-trailer-02-veus-caindo: Several thin silk veils descend slowly one after another through a column of warm golden light. Soft dust particles float gently upward as the veils fall. Deep navy background.
nomear-trailer-03-agua-ondula: Single ripple expands slowly outward on a still dark water surface. Concentric rings widen and spread toward the edges of the frame. Warm reflection gently bends with each ring. Nothing else moves.
nomear-trailer-04-cozinha-antiga: Slow push-in toward an enamel cup and saucer on a weathered wooden table. Thin wisp of steam rises slowly from the cup. Soft morning light holds steady through a thin curtain.
nomear-trailer-05-veu-luminoso: Slow pull-out from a single luminous silk veil. The fabric rises and falls slowly as if breathing. Warm golden glow behind holds steady. Deep navy surroundings widen as the camera retreats.
nomear-trailer-06-mapa-territorio: Slow overhead drift-in toward an old paper map and brass compass on dark wood. One corner of the map curls upward gently. Compass needle steady. Soft side lamp light holds.
nomear-trailer-07-sete-velas: Slow cinematic dolly moving horizontally along a line of seven unlit beeswax candles on dark stone. Long soft shadows stretch gently as the camera travels. Candles unchanged.
nomear-trailer-08-caixa-fechada: Very slow push-in toward a closed dark wooden box on a worn shelf. Fine dust particles drift slowly in a soft beam of side light. Box perfectly still. Sealed atmosphere.
nomear-trailer-09-porta-luz: Slow push-in toward an ajar wooden doorway at the end of a dark corridor. Warm golden light holds steady through the opening. Fine dust particles drift softly in the beam across old wooden floorboards.
nomear-ep01-01-voz-antiga: Slow push-in toward the old tile kitchen. The oil lamp flame flickers gently. Fine dust particles drift slowly through the golden window beam across the wooden table. The hanging copper pot holds perfectly still. Deep corner shadows unchanged throughout.
nomear-ep01-02-sacos-porta: Slow push-in toward the hallway. The three paper shopping bags hold perfectly still. Late afternoon light rectangle on the floor visibly shifts . One bag's top flap trembles once, very faintly, as if a breath passed through the open door.
nomear-ep01-03-cozinha-vazia: Slow push-in toward the worn kitchen table. A thin wisp of steam rises slowly and curls from the ceramic cup. The folded linen cloth perfectly still. The yellowed curtain behind barely breathes against the window. Dust drifts through the window beam.
nomear-ep01-04-anel-heranca: Extreme macro, almost static. The camera orbits right over ten seconds around the gold ring on velvet. Warm side light holds steady. Fine dust motes drift slowly in the beam. The ring unchanged, its tiny stone catching light gently as the angle shifts.
nomear-ep01-05-montra-loja: Slow push-in toward the wet shop window from the street. Raindrops trace slow wet lines down the glass one after another. Warm interior light steady. Distant streetlamp reflections shimmer very faintly on the cobblestones below. Nothing else moves.
nomear-ep01-06-mesa-jantar: Slow push-in toward the single dinner plate. Warm pendant lamp light holds steady above casting the circle of light. Fine dust particles drift slowly through the lamp's beam. The plate, napkin, glass all perfectly still. Surrounding shadow unchanged.
nomear-ep01-07-moedas-mesa: Very slow horizontal drift right across the dark cafe table. The worn coins, folded banknotes, empty cup and crumpled bill pass slowly through the frame. Warm overhead light steady. Nothing on the table moves, only the camera breathes across.
nomear-ep01-08-tecido-vento: The long pale linen curtain rises slowly as if with a soft inhale and settles again with an exhale, repeats twice over ten seconds. Golden dusk light passes through the weave revealing threads. The single dried rose on the sill holds perfectly still.
nomear-ep01-09-balanca-antiga: Slow push-in toward the brass balance scale. The uneven pans drift as if still seeking balance. Warm directional side light holds steady. Long shadow on the aged wall unchanged. Fine dust drifts slowly in the light.
nomear-ep01-10-raizes-chao: Very slow crane rising two feet over the exposed tree roots at dawn. Cool morning mist drifts close to the earth below. Warm first light spreads visibly between the trunks. Roots perfectly still, only the mist and the light move.
nomear-ep01-11-fresta-luz: Very slow push-in toward the slightly ajar wooden doorway at the end of the corridor. Warm golden lamp light holds steady through the opening. Fine dust particles drift softly in the beam as the camera advances. The rest of the hallway stays in deep shadow.
nomear-ep02-01-noite-quarto: Slow push-in through the dim bedroom toward the amber bedside lamp. The lamp flame flickers continuously throughout, casting soft dancing shadows that sway on the wall behind the bed. Fine dust particles drift through the warm glow.
nomear-ep02-02-ecra-glow: Slow push-in through the dark bedroom toward the smartphone on the wooden bedside table. Fine dust particles drift continuously through the cold screen light around the edges of the frame. Shadows in the blurred room beyond shift as the camera approaches.
nomear-ep02-03-extracto-papel: Slow camera orbit rightward around the folded bank statement on the dark desk. Fine dust particles drift continuously through the warm side lamp beam cutting across the paper. The warm light rotates visibly across the wood grain as the camera moves.
nomear-ep02-04-veredicto-martelo: Slow crane descending over the wooden gavel on the courtroom bench. Fine dust particles swirl and dance continuously through the diagonal shaft of warm window light cutting across the bench. The warm beam visibly sweeps along the wood as the camera descends.
nomear-ep02-05-reflexo-vidro: Slow push-in through the dim apartment toward the rain-streaked window. Raindrops trace fresh wet lines down the glass continuously, one after another in constant flow. Distant amber city lights beyond pulse and shimmer through the wet surface.
nomear-ep02-06-relogio-noite: Slow push-in down the dim hallway toward the old pendulum wall clock. The brass pendulum arcs horizontally from side to side continuously, moving left then right then left again with a slow metronomic rhythm. Its long shadow slides across the aged plaster wall in perfect measure.
nomear-ep02-07-suspiro-cortina: Slow dolly leftward past the pale cream curtain hanging over the slightly open window. The curtain billows inward toward the camera as if with a slow deep inhale, then settles back outward with a long slow exhale. This breathing motion of the curtain repeats twice over the ten seconds, filling the frame with gentle continuous fabric motion. Soft dim blue night light sits behind.
nomear-ep02-08-laptop-uma-manha: Slow push-in through the dark room toward the open laptop on the wooden desk. The warm amber desk lamp in the background flickers continuously, making soft shadows dance and sway on the wall beyond throughout the scene. The cold light from the laptop screen falls steady on the scattered envelopes. The laptop and envelopes remain fixed.
nomear-ep02-09-chavena-reuniao: Slow dolly leftward across the dark cafe table, passing the empty espresso cup and crumpled notes. Fine dust particles drift continuously through the warm overhead pendant light. The pendant sways gently above, making the shadows on the table surface rock side-to-side throughout.
nomear-ep03-01-desculpa-porta: Slow push-in toward the closed front door from the dim hallway. The soft warm light under the door frame pulses gently and continuously, as if someone breathes on the other side. Shadows along the wooden floor tremble with the light. Fine dust drifts slowly through the faint glow.
nomear-ep03-02-palavras-cor: Very slow macro orbit around the neat pile of blank white cards. The warm side light flickers gently, casting breathing shadows along the edges of the cards. The topmost card lifts and settles once mid-clip, as if a draft passed. Dust drifts through the light.
nomear-ep03-03-cansaco-corredor: Very slow push-in down the long narrow hallway toward the single amber wall sconce. The sconce flame flickers continuously, casting trembling light that sways along the aged wallpaper. Fine dust particles drift slowly through the warm glow. Shadows breathe softly along the walls.
nomear-ep03-04-conta-dividida: Slow horizontal drift right across the dark cafe table. The warm overhead lamp above sways gently, its light rocking soft shadows over the folded bill and coins. Dust particles drift continuously through the light. The bill's folded edge trembles once as air passes.
nomear-ep03-05-prato-barato: Slow push-in toward the simple soup bowl. A thin wisp of steam rises slowly and curls from the surface continuously throughout. The warm low lamp above flickers gently, casting breathing shadows across the empty chairs in the background. Dust drifts through the beam.
nomear-ep03-06-mesa-longa: Very slow push-in along the long empty restaurant table. The warm dim hanging lights above sway gently, their light rocking soft shadows along the pulled-back chairs and half-empty glasses. Wine and water catch the shifting light in continuous reflections. Dust drifts through the beams.
nomear-ep03-07-janela-fechada: Slow push-in toward the closed window. Distant blurred city lights beyond the glass pulse softly and continuously, each flickering at its own rhythm. The soft interior lamp reflection on the glass wavers gently. Dust particles drift through the muted amber glow near the sill.
nomear-ep03-08-casaco-cabide: Slow push-in toward the single dark coat on the wall hook. The coat sways gently and continuously, as if the hallway itself breathes slowly. The soft warm side lamp flickers gently, casting shifting shadows on the aged wooden floor below. Dust drifts through the warm glow.
nomear-ep03-09-noite-perdida: Slow push-in from across the empty rainy street. Raindrops continuously fall through the frame, streaking past the view of the warm restaurant window. The amber light inside flickers gently. Reflections of the restaurant ripple across the wet cobblestones in constant motion.
nomear-ep03-10-convite-porta: Very slow push-in toward the slightly ajar front door from outside. Soft mist drifts continuously across the dark stone step. The warm golden light from inside pulses gently, growing gently brighter and softer. Fine dust particles float through the beam spilling onto the step.
nomear-ep04-01-preco-papel: Very slow macro orbit around the handwritten price tag. The warm side light flickers gently, making the paper shadow breathe along the dark wood grain. The paper's edge trembles continuously as if a faint draft passes. Fine dust drifts through the beam.
nomear-ep04-02-lapis-apagar: Slow macro push-in toward the pencil and worn eraser. The overhead light flickers gently and continuously, casting soft breathing shadows across the paper smudges. Dust particles drift slowly through the beam. The pencil rolls mid-clip as if someone sighed.
nomear-ep04-03-voz-cassete: Slow push-in toward the old cassette beside the tape player. The amber desk lamp flickers gently, casting trembling warm light across the plastic shell of the cassette. The small reels turn gently on their own as if the tape breathes. Dust drifts continuously through the glow.
nomear-ep04-04-medo-generosidade: Slow push-in toward the ceramic vase with dried flowers. The dried petals sway gently and continuously in imaginary breeze by the window. The soft backlight pulses slowly through the stems, breathing across the sill. Fine dust drifts through the backlit rays.
nomear-ep04-05-heranca-fio: Extreme macro. The single long silk thread sways slowly and continuously, catching shifting light as if a breath passes along its length. The soft side light flickers gently, revealing the thin shadow moving below. Dust drifts through the beam.
nomear-ep04-06-mae-servir: Slow horizontal drift left across the family dining table. The warm low hanging lamp above sways gently, rocking soft shadows across the plates of different sizes. A thin wisp of steam rises slowly from the fullest plate continuously. Dust drifts through the pendant light.
nomear-ep04-07-avos-pedir: Very slow macro orbit around the rosary beads and folded handkerchief. The warm side light flickers gently, making the shadows of each bead breathe along the aged wood. The handkerchief's edge trembles once as if touched. Dust drifts through the glow.
nomear-ep04-08-veus-sobrepostos: Slow push-in toward the overlapping sheer veils. Each layer sways and breathes continuously in the soft dusk breeze, rising and settling at its own rhythm. The light passing through pulses softly, revealing the layered threads in constant motion. Dust floats slowly through the cream tones.
nomear-ep04-09-moedas-janela: Slow horizontal drift right along the wooden windowsill, passing the line of coins. The soft daylight from behind pulses gently and continuously, making each coin catch shifting glints of light. Dust particles drift through the backlit rays around the metal edges.
nomear-ep04-10-lugar-no-mundo: Very slow push-in toward the empty wooden chair at the centre of the sunlit room. The soft window beams behind the chair are filled with fine dust continuously drifting and swirling. The chair casts a long shadow that creeps gently across the floor as the light shifts.
nomear-ep05-01-casa-calou: Very slow push-in through the quiet living room toward the single lit lamp and armchair. The lamp flickers gently and continuously, casting breathing shadows that sway across the walls. Fine dust particles drift slowly through the warm beam. The aged armchair cushion settles gently.
nomear-ep05-02-cadeira-sos: Slow push-in toward the single armchair beside the reading lamp. Dust particles continuously drift and swirl through the small circle of warm light. The lamp flickers softly, making the circle of light pulse and breathe on the floor. The armchair fabric catches shifting folds of light.
nomear-ep05-03-calculadora-noite: Slow push-in toward the old desktop calculator on the dark desk. The amber lamp flickers continuously, making breathing shadows along the wood grain. The paper beside the calculator trembles once as a draft passes. Dust drifts steadily through the amber beam.
nomear-ep05-04-contas-mesa: Slow push-in toward the pile of unopened envelopes. The soft overhead light flickers gently, casting breathing shadows across the paper stack. The top envelope's edge trembles continuously as if air passes across it. Dust drifts slowly through the warm glow.
nomear-ep05-05-corredor-portas: Very slow push-in down the dim hallway past the closed doors on both sides. The warm sconce flames flicker continuously, casting trembling light that sways along the aged wallpaper. Dust particles drift through each warm pool of light. Shadows breathe softly on the doors.
nomear-ep05-06-duas-cadeiras: Slow horizontal drift right across the two empty chairs facing each other. The soft side lamp flickers gently, making breathing shadows rock across both chairs and the small round table between. Dust particles drift continuously through the beam. One chair catches shifting light.
nomear-ep05-07-chaves-prato: Very slow macro orbit around the house keys in the ceramic dish. The warm side light flickers softly and continuously, making each key catch shifting glints of light. Fine dust drifts through the warm glow. The ceramic rim catches breathing shadows.
nomear-ep05-08-gaiola-porta: Slow push-in toward the antique birdcage. The small open cage door sways gently and continuously, as if the room itself breathes. The soft side light flickers, making the delicate bars cast breathing shadows along the dark shelf. Dust drifts through the warm beam.
nomear-ep05-09-corredor-luz: Very slow push-in down the long tiled corridor toward the distant warm light. The light at the far end pulses softly and continuously, growing gently brighter as the camera approaches. Fine mist drifts through the corridor, passing through the warm cone of light.
nomear-ep05-10-numero-ecra: Extreme macro slow push-in toward the LCD calculator display. The blurred soft numerals pulse faintly as if the display breathes. The warm side light flickers gently, casting shifting highlights across the plastic. Fine dust drifts continuously through the beam around the screen.
nomear-ep05-11-porta-aberta: Very slow push-in toward the open apartment door onto the stairwell landing. The warm light from beyond pulses gently and continuously, inviting the frame outward. Fine dust particles drift through the threshold. The door itself sways as air passes.
nomear-ep06-01-frigorifico-aberto: Slow push-in toward the slightly ajar fridge in the dark kitchen. The cold blue interior light pulses softly and continuously, as if the fridge hums. The rectangle of light on the tiled floor wavers gently. Fine dust particles drift slowly through the cold beam.
nomear-ep06-02-telefone-cama: Slow macro push-in toward the smartphone face up on the bed sheet. The cold pale screen glow pulses rhythmically as if scrolling never stops. The bed sheet fibres catch shifting light continuously. Dust particles drift slowly through the cold rectangle of light on the fabric.
nomear-ep06-03-montra-vazia: Slow drift to the right along the dimly lit storefront window. Raindrops continuously trace wet lines down the glass, distorting the mannequin forms behind. Distant street lights reflected on wet cobblestones pulse softly. The warm interior light flickers gently.
nomear-ep06-04-tigela-vazia: Very slow macro orbit around the empty ceramic bowl. The overhead light flickers softly, making breathing shadows across the interior of the bowl. Dust particles drift continuously through the beam. The bowl's glaze catches shifting highlights.
nomear-ep06-05-comida-inacabada: Slow push-in toward the half eaten plate. A thin wisp of steam rises slowly and curls from the leftover food, continuous throughout. The warm overhead light flickers gently, making the fork handle catch shifting glints. Dust drifts through the beam.
nomear-ep06-06-banco-neblina: Slow push-in toward the empty wooden park bench. Soft mist drifts continuously across the bench and along the ground. Bare branches in the blurred background sway gently with the breeze. The diffused dusk light pulses gently through the mist.
nomear-ep06-07-vela-apagada: Extreme macro slow push-in toward the unlit beeswax candle beside the matchbox. The soft window light pulses gently and continuously, making the wax surface catch shifting warm highlights. Dust particles drift slowly through the diffused beam. The candle wick trembles gently.
nomear-ep06-08-cortina-palco: Slow push-in toward the heavy velvet stage curtain. The parted fold sways gently and continuously as if the stage itself breathes from behind. The warm dim light beyond pulses softly, spilling through the gap in shifting rays. Fine dust drifts through the amber beam.
nomear-ep06-09-gotas-anel: Slow extreme macro push-in toward the film of water. Concentric ripples continuously expand outward from the centre, new rings forming as the previous ones fade toward the edges. A new drop falls gently at the end of the clip, creating fresh ripples. Light shimmers on each ring.
nomear-ep07-01-carta-caixa: Slow push-in toward the sealed letter half-dropped into the iron mailbox slot. The envelope's exposed edge trembles gently and continuously as the night air passes around it. The soft street light from above pulses softly. Fine mist drifts through the frame continuously.
nomear-ep07-02-ondas-tardias: Slow extreme macro push-in toward the dark pool surface. Concentric ripples continuously expand outward toward the far edge of the water, new rings forming behind them. The warm reflection in the water bends and stretches with each ring. Light shimmers on every crest.
nomear-ep07-03-caixa-musica: Slow macro push-in toward the old music box. The small handle turns continuously on its own, rotating slowly throughout the clip. The amber lamp beside flickers gently, making the brass gears catch shifting highlights. Fine dust drifts through the warm beam around the box.
nomear-ep07-04-relogio-tarde: Slow push-in toward the old pendulum clock in the dim hallway. The brass pendulum arcs horizontally from side to side continuously, moving left then right then left again with a slow steady rhythm. The long shadow across the wooden floor slides gently with each pass.
nomear-ep07-05-no-corda: Very slow macro orbit around the tight knot in the thick rope. The soft side light flickers gently, revealing each individual fibre of the tension in shifting detail. The rope's tension settles gently throughout. Dust particles drift slowly through the beam.
nomear-ep07-06-sala-escura: Slow push-in toward the dim sitting room with the single chair facing the wall. The heavy curtains sway gently and continuously, letting thin rays of cool light pulse softly through the gap. Dust particles drift through the beams. The wooden chair catches shifting shadow.
nomear-ep07-07-marionete: Slow push-in toward the suspended marionette cross bar. The loose strings sway gently and continuously below, each at its own rhythm in the faint breeze. The warm amber light flickers, making the strings catch shifting highlights. The cross bar turns gently throughout.
